capabilities_confirmed: multiperspectival observer composes directional interactions for co-active center pairs
absorption / repulsion / interference / directional coagulation computed via vendor primitives
interference antisymmetry K_ij + K_ji = 0 verified bit-perfect in runtime
I_i<-j != I_j<-i (directional asymmetry preserved under unequal capacities)
class-wise normalization: directional terms / N(N-1), shared coag / N(N-1)/2 -> total bounded for N=1/4/8/16
shared-coagulation candidates emitted as RelationCandidate; do NOT auto-flip individual Omega
reference-field anchor from Omega centers influences disrupt_eff but cannot replace threshold rule
per-center isolation (v0.4.1) preserved when centers are not co-active in same consolidate pass
passive invariance: runtime ops, signals, audit_log identical OFF vs ON
persist/load roundtrips interaction_log and relation_candidates (payload v0.5.0)
limitations_remaining: in-episode aggregation still aggregates per-center observations into a single delta_X (Etapa 5 may revisit)
Z_norm not a reliable single-axis discriminator (AR/kappa preferred)
advisory feedback still read-only; queues / priorities are v0.5.1 work
relation candidates produce metadata only; no relation registry persisted as first-class entity
Phi_a for interference is seeded per (center, episode); reproducible but synthetic
notes: Multiperspectival observer is opt-in (default OFF) and remains passive: traces and candidates are audit, never UFME write-back. Reference-field anchor cannot coagulate B from A alone.
